message:
🐛 fix: move Playwright E2E tests from PR checks to post-merge

* 🐛 fix: address issues #3083, #3065, #3070, #3086, #3076, #3089, #3090, #3073

- #3083: start.sh cleanup() checks PID before printing kc-agent status message
- #3065: add localStorage mock to vitest setup; config hooks only use demo
  data fallback when isDemoMode() is true (was returning demo data in live mode
  on REST failure); all 20 tests now pass
- #3070: remove deprecated GHCopilotProvider registration from agent registry
- #3086: fix RBACExplorer initial load — use useEffect instead of useState
  side-effect anti-pattern
- #3076: increase AI summary timeout 30s→60s; improve WS error message in
  SaveResolutionDialog
- #3089: fix sidebar cluster status count mismatch — derive unhealthy count
  as (total - healthy - offline) so all clusters are always accounted for
- #3090: make full sidebar customizer row draggable (not just waffle icon);
  stop pointer events on delete button to prevent drag interference
- #3073: anchor "Add Folder" (+) button to Local Files header row in Community
  Missions browser — pass onAdd prop to TreeNodeItem so button renders inside
  the header, not alongside the entire expanded tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* 🐛 fix: move Playwright tests from PR checks to post-merge only

Playwright E2E tests were running on every PR, adding ~15 min to the
review cycle and causing frequent flakes that blocked merges.

- Remove pull_request trigger from playwright.yml
- Tests still run on push to main/dev (post-merge) and on demand (workflow_dispatch)
- Cross-browser tests already run nightly via playwright-nightly.yml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,11 +6,7 @@ on:
     paths:
       - 'web/**'
       - '.github/workflows/playwright.yml'
-  pull_request:
-    branches: [main, dev]
-    paths:
-      - 'web/**'
-      - '.github/workflows/playwright.yml'
+  workflow_dispatch: {}
 
 concurrency:
   group: playwright-${{ github.ref }}
